drl:
rule "R0"
when
    T0(f1 <= 2, f1 != 7, $b0_0_0 : f1, $b0_0_1 : f0)
then
end
rule "R1"
salience -10
no-loop
when
    T1(f1 == 5.0, f2 matches "p", f0 contains "ab" || f3 == true, $b1_0_0 : f1, $b1_0_1 : f3)
then
end
rule "R2"
salience 9
agenda-group "gb"
when
    accumulate( T0(f1 != 100, f1 > -2); $a2_0 : count() )
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    insert(new T1("b", -2.0, "b", true));
    insert(new T1("ab", $a2_0, "zz", true));
end
rule "R3"
salience($b3_0_0 + $b3_0_0)
when
    T1($b3_0_0 : f1)
then
end
rule "R4"
when
    $p4_0 : T0($b4_0_0 : f1, $b4_0_1 : f0)
then
    insert(new T1("b", $b4_0_0, "a", true));
    insert(new T1("alpha", $p4_0.getF0(), "ab", true));
end
rule "R5"
when
    accumulate( T1($s5_0 : f1); $a5_0 : collectSet($s5_0) )
then
end
